projectDescription: 12-DOF quadruped robot simulation with reinforcement learning-based adaptive gait control for rough terrain navigation using MuJoCo, PPO, and ROS2
keyFeatures: 12-DOF quadruped with parallel SCARA leg mechanism (5-bar linkage)
Diagonal gait controller with Bézier curve swing trajectories
PPO-based reinforcement learning for adaptive gait parameters and residual corrections
MuJoCo physics simulation with flat and rough terrain environments
ROS2 integration for real-time control and sensor data streaming
PyQt5 GUI with joystick support for teleoperation
3DOF inverse kinematics solver for parallel SCARA mechanism
Comprehensive testing framework comparing baseline vs adaptive performance
publicApiSurface: DiagonalGaitController - Trot gait generator with diagonal swing pairs
AdaptiveGaitController - Gait controller with online parameter adaptation
AdaptiveGaitEnv - Gymnasium environment for adaptive gait + residual learning
ResidualWalkEnv - Gymnasium environment for residual-only learning
GaitParameters - Configuration dataclass for gait parameters
SensorReader - MuJoCo sensor data reader utility
apply_leg_angles() - Apply joint angles to MuJoCo leg actuators
train_adaptive_gait_ppo.py - PPO training script for adaptive gait
play_adaptive_policy.py - Policy evaluation and visualization script
compare_baseline_adaptive.py - Benchmark test comparing baseline vs adaptive performance
RobotControlNode - ROS2 node for camera/sensor publishing and command subscription
GuiRosNode - ROS2 node for GUI interface with joystick control
